concept_hook: Cuban siren whose enchanting voice debuffs foes' aggression, letting her agile strikes slip through defenses undefended.
narrative_role: charismatic temptress who exposes rivals' insecurities through psychological seduction
media_archetype_inspiration: seductive sirens from Hades video game

concept_hook: Russian ice witch who revels in freezing opponents solid, savoring their panicked thrashing before shattering them.
body_type: lithe pale beauty with platinum hair
narrative_role: ruthless tactician haunted by the thrill of her own destructive impulses

concept_hook: Singaporean chemist who kisses with toxin-laced lips, giggling as stronger foes convulse from her untraceable nerve agents.
body_type: petite sleek asian with mischievous eyes
narrative_role: sly underdog who turns brawn against itself via science
media_archetype_inspiration: Poison Ivy from DC Comics but tech-focused

concept_hook: Hungarian gymnast prodigy who flips through strikes unscathed, her quiet fury building with every bruise she endures.
narrative_role: pure talent rising star challenging the unnatural
media_archetype_inspiration: flexible fighters like Juri from Street Fighter

concept_hook: Greek puppeteer whose enchanted strings yank foes into self-inflicted wounds, her detached smile hiding survivor's guilt.
narrative_role: manipulative midcard heel who controls the pace

concept_hook: Spanish tracker who sets razor traps and exploits wounds with precise javelins, hardening her resolve each time she's bloodied.
body_type: athletic toned latina with fierce gaze
narrative_role: relentless pursuer forcing fights into endurance tests
media_archetype_inspiration: Artemis-inspired huntresses from God of War

concept_hook: Brazilian solar sovereign who blasts with plasma gauntlets, her arrogance cracking only when outmaneuvered by lesser foes.
narrative_role: dominant champion whose hubris invites upsets
media_archetype_inspiration: Sun empresses like from Final Fantasy

concept_hook: Irish gene-spliced speedster whose nanite boosts let her dismantle giants, masking her fear of losing control with cocky grins.
narrative_role: volatile wildcard bridging science and savagery
media_archetype_inspiration: cyborg experiments like Revy from Black Lagoon enhanced
